Tabbed by: EmeraldEyzs

INTRO:  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch] 2x


[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em7[/ch]

[tab]            [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch] 
 Everyone's quitting, everyone's breaking down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]Em7[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]   
 Nobody answered, but I know you're home[/tab]

                (x3x231)  (x2x031)

[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                
 No, I don't wanna know[/tab]
